retry_reason: Not a wrapper; the refcount operation is an incidental error-handling step, not a primary reference-count operation.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is sysfs registration (checking state, creating a kset, adding a kobject). The kobject_put is only used for cleanup on failure of kobject_add, not as the main refcount management.
